log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Aasimar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---

→ Aasimar — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 20] FAIL! 27 necrotic damage. HP: 40/67

→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:16+12=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 fire damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
=== ROUND 6 ===
